metadata.title:
WORLDS SUFFRAGETTES BEGIN SESSIONS IN


LONDON WITH AMERICAN WOMAN IN CHAIR

INTERNATIONAL WoMAN'S SUF-
FRAGE ASSOCIATION OPENS
NINE DAY CONGRESS, WITH
DELEGATES PRESENT FROM
EVERY CORNER OF THE
EARTH.

pages.raw_text:
LONDON, April 26.-The suf-
fragets began to report progress
this morning in every tongue when
Mrs. Carrie Chapman Gait of New
York called to order the worlds
congress of the International Wom-
ans Suffrage alliance.


Thousands of delegates are
here. They come from every civ
flied land on both hemispheres.


The delegates aren't limited to
the six each that these Is coun-
tries are entitled to send: Aus
tralia, Bulgaria, Canada, Den
mark, Finland, Germany. Great
Britain, Hungary, Italy, Neither
lands, Norway, Russia, South AT
RIGA, Sweden, Switzerland and the
United States. Many other ma
tional associations in sympathy
with the suffrage movement have
accepted the invitation to send
fraternal delegates. Answering to
roll call:


Dignifed danes of London aris-
tocracy. who have chained them
selves to parliament seats and
then shouted their demand for
equal rights; who have clawed at
the eyes of many bobby" who
sought to break up their demon
STATIONS; who have served time in
filthy cells as felons-all for the
cause.


Light hearted fashion plates from
Paris, not so strenuous, but just
as clamorous as their English sis
tiers for the vote.


Domesticated frauleins of Ber-
lin who have won lots of municipal
era 3oyment for their sex, but yet
lack suffrage.


The enfranchised women Of
Australia.


Finnish women, strongly repre-
scented In parliament.


American women who are In
possession of the franchise in a
number Of states and who are now
fighting for full suffrage before is
legislatures.
p The women of Sweden, fresh
from a victorious fight for votes.


Norwegian women, who OBJ.
tanned the franchise year ago.


Irish and Russian women, par
TALLY successful.


Demure little Japanese women,
contentedly playing waiting
game.


Mixed delegates from far-off In
dia, South Africa and South Amer
lea. Some from Canada and Ice
land


Assorted delegates of various
races and various compilations
from various corners of the earth
